---
title: "Sounds & Phonemes"
---
| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Sounds & Phonemes ↗</span> | SGN Ch. 3: *Sounds in the Brain* <br>SGN Ch. 4: *A neural code for speech* | <br>Mesgarani et al. 2014 |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::
